ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student attends */,
  "isd_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Independent School District (ISD) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the school belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Academic score of the student */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's guardian */,
  "guardian_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the guardian */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the school */,
  "graduation_year" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_isd_id FOREIGN KEY ("isd_id") REFERENCES isds ("isd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "isd_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ISD the school belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the school belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the principal */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_isd_id FOREIGN KEY ("isd_id") REFERENCES isds ("isd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isds" (
  "isd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISD */,
  "isd_name" TEXT /* Name of the ISD */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the ISD belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the ISD */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the ISD */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the ISD */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the ISD */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the superintendent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the regional office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the regional office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the regional office */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the regional office */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the regional director */,
  "director_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the regional director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Academic score of the student */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the student based on the score */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was obtained */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., midterm, final, standardized test) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who administered the test */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the test is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "school_year" TEXT /* School year for the record */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the courses were taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the semester */,
  "courses" TEXT /* List of courses taken during the semester */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average for the semester */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance percentage for the semester */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who provided the grade */,
  "course_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the courses taken during the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular activity */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student participating in the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the extracurricular activity */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., sports, arts, clubs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards or recognitions received during the activity */,
  "hours_participated" INTEGER /* Total hours participated in the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurricular_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose record is accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the student record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the student record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
